title: Fast Fiction Factory Broad Source-Span Split
purpose: Focused local source-span quality readback that resolves the two broad source-span rows with one narrower split and one explicit keep reason while preserving routing regression, Review Memory, the source-span pack, model/API boundary, adapter artifacts, freeform review, and human-owned canon boundaries without starting model/API work.

$entry = $memory | Where-Object { $_.artifact_id -eq $artifactId }; if (-not $entry) { throw ('Missing review memory entry: ' + $artifactId) } }; foreach ($entry in $memory) { foreach ($field in $requiredMemoryFields) { if (-not ($entry.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains $field)) { throw ('Missing review memory field ' + $field + ' for ' + $entry.artifact_id) } } }; $broad = Get-Content artifacts/broad-span-split-result.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($broad.artifact_id -ne 'fff-broad-span-split-001' -or $broad.schemaVersion -ne 'fff.broadSpanSplit.v1' -or -not $broad.passed) { throw 'Broad span split result mismatch' }; if ($broad.summary.broad_span_rows_loaded -ne 2 -or $broad.summary.split_into_narrower_spans -ne 1 -or $broad.summary.keep_with_reason -ne 1 -or $broad.summary.hold_for_human_review -ne 0 -or $broad.summary.source_refs_preserved -ne 2 -or $broad.summary.failures -ne 0) { throw 'Broad span split count mismatch' }; foreach ($prop in $broad.broad_span_checks.PSObject.Properties) { if ($prop.Value.passed -ne $true) { throw ('Broad span split check failed: ' + $prop.Name) } }; $regression = Get-Content artifacts/routing-policy-regression-hardening-result.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; node tools/fff-state.mjs smoke-routing-policy artifacts/ambiguous-routing-resolution-result.json artifacts/routing-policy-regression-hardening-result.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Routing policy regression smoke failed' }; node tools/fff-source-span-review-pack.mjs artifacts/extraction-adapter-fixtures artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-expansion-smoke-result.json artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json; $allOutputs = @($single) + @($matrixOutputs); foreach ($payload in $allOutputs) { foreach ($element in @($payload.extractedElements)) { if ($element.elementType -eq 'visual_asset') { if (@($element.targetDestinations) -contains 'claim') { throw ('Visual asset routes to claim: ' + $element.id) }; if (@($element.targetClaimIds).Count -ne 0) { throw ('Visual asset has Claim target ids: ' + $element.id) } }; if ($element.elementType -eq 'source_reference') { if (-not ((@($element.targetDestinations).Count -eq 1) -and (@($element.targetDestinations) -contains 'source_reference'))) { throw ('Source reference route drift: ' + $element.id) } } } }; Get-ChildItem artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs -Filter *.json | ForEach-Object { node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction $_.FullName; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw ('Adapter output validation failed: ' + $_.Name) } }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/current-project-state.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Current state validation failed' }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/sample-project-state.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Sample state validation failed' }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction artifacts/sample-extraction-payload.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Sample extraction validation failed' };
